title: Mr K George is hiring!
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Position available: Manager

Location: George

Are you a professional, detail-oriented individual (aged 30–50) passionate about precious metals, bullion, and diamonds? We are seeking a Manager to oversee store operations, lead a team, and uphold our brand's high standards.

Key responsibilities:

- Manage the consultant, daily store operations, gold purchases and sales
- Build and maintain strong customer relationships
- Purchase, test, and sell precious metals, bullion, and diamonds with precision
- Perform reconciliations, EFT payments, and petty cash management
- Ensure accurate stock records, end-of-day cash-ups, and immaculate store presentation
- Drive sales, meet team targets, and initiate marketing ideas
- Handle social media leads and client queries promptly and professionally
- Verify clients as per the company’s RMCP and maintain compliance

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

- Education: Grade 12 with Mathematics (certificate required – Mathematics Literacy is not valid, unfortunately)
- Experience: Proven retail management experience (precious metals / jewellery preferred)

Skills:

- Fluent in Afrikaans and English, with excellent verbal and written communication
- Proficient in MS Office and Outlook (Xero will be advantageous)
- Excellent numerical, organizational, and time management skills
- Presentable, honest, dependable, and detail-oriented
- Willing to work Saturdays (9:00–13:00) and overtime as needed
- Ability to pass a background check (no criminal record)

What we expect:

- Uphold our brand values, ethics, and confidentiality at all times
- Be accountable, ambitious, and eager to grow with the company
- Approach tasks timeously with diligence, accuracy, and a positive attitude
- Excellent communication with both clients and the Directors at all times

If you meet all criteria and share our commitment to excellence, email your CV, cover letter, and supporting documents to [email protected], using "lovegold" as the subject line.

Applications close in two weeks. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
